name: probe-gadget
description: Test gadget emitting a deterministic postMessage probe on first render.

exports.description: Test gadget emitting a deterministic postMessage probe on first render.
exports.usage: Mount in an iframe and listen for window.message events of type 'GGUI_TEST_PROBE_FIRED' to confirm the gadget loaded + executed under CSP. Used by the Slice 4.5 marketplace lifecycle e2e.
